name: Human Husk
description:
- Husk wants to forget again and pushes you away.

Hi, actually this bot was invented for my personal use, but still decided to add it to the public access. Maybe someone will also be interested.

Most of the biography and some personal moments of Husk made based on headcanons that I considered appropriate and logical within the characters development (Especially considering that it is a human version of Husk Lol), so the canonicality is not claimed, but I tried my best to convey its essence

Unfortunately the author of the art I do not know, if anyone knows - write that I would indicate it.
creator: JynCrimson
